name: 4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA)

notes.en: 60°C water bath to dissolve (do not exceed 70°C); add NaOH to clarify; cool and adjust pH to 7.4. Filter (0.45 µm). Aliquot at −20°C.
notes.zh: 60°C 水浴搅拌溶解 (勿超 70°C)，加 NaOH 至澄清，冷却后调 pH 至 7.4。过滤 (0.45 µm)。分装 -20°C 保存。⚠️ 通风橱操作！

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec11863; Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29–40

storage.notes: Toxic; fume hood required; -20°C for longer storage

usage.en: 4% paraformaldehyde fixative for cells and tissue sections (IF, IHC, flow cytometry).
usage.zh: 4% 多聚甲醛固定液，用于细胞和组织切片固定（IF、IHC、流式）。

prepSteps.step: Heat ~400 mL PBS to 60°C on hotplate in fume hood.
prepSteps.warning: Paraformaldehyde is toxic and a fixative — work in fume hood, wear gloves.

prepSteps.step: Add PFA powder and stir until dissolved (add 1–2 drops NaOH to help).
Aliquot and store at −20°C; thawed aliquot at 4°C for 1 week.
